info.name: Smart Recruitment Platform - Mobile App
info.description: Mobile consumer collection. Includes public discovery APIs and authenticated job seeker APIs only. Suspended accounts receive USER_SUSPENDED; candidate recruitment mutations for non-approved companies receive COMPANY_RECRUITMENT_UNAVAILABLE while historical data remains readable. TODO: add dedicated saved-jobs endpoints here if the backend later supports them.

request.description: Mobile App / Job Seeker: create a job seeker account. Requires accepted terms; optional phone is saved on the job seeker profile.
Mobile App / Job Seeker: login and stores the returned Sanctum token in {{job_seeker_token}}.
Mobile App / Job Seeker: fetch the authenticated user and nested job seeker profile.
Mobile App / Job Seeker: request a password reset email. The API always returns a generic success message.
Mobile App / Job Seeker: reset password using a broker token from email or tests. Set {{reset_token}} before sending.
Mobile App / Job Seeker: change password while authenticated. Other tokens are revoked and the current token remains valid.
Mobile App / Job Seeker: revoke the current Sanctum token.
Mobile App / Job Seeker: revoke all Sanctum tokens for the authenticated job seeker.
Mobile App / Public: browse published jobs.
Browse approved-company jobs using the on_site, remote, or hybrid work mode.
Returns open approved-company jobs whose deadline is null or has not passed.
Returns work_mode, application_deadline, deadline flags, can_apply, and required/optional skills. Expired open jobs remain visible with can_apply=false.
Mobile App / Public: view public job details.
Mobile App / Job Seeker: get explainable recommended jobs.
Mobile App / Public: load skills for search and profile forms.
Mobile App / Job Seeker: load profile with experiences, education, and skills.
Mobile App / Job Seeker: update manual profile fields.
Mobile App / Job Seeker: add a manual experience. Responses include source_type, source_cv_file_id, and user_verified_at; manually entered data is saved as manual and verified.
Mobile App / Job Seeker: list manual experiences. Responses include source_type, source_cv_file_id, and user_verified_at.
Mobile App / Job Seeker: update an owned experience. Manual updates keep manual data as the verified source.
Mobile App / Job Seeker: add education. Responses include source_type, source_cv_file_id, and user_verified_at; manually entered data is saved as manual and verified.
Mobile App / Job Seeker: list education. Responses include source_type, source_cv_file_id, and user_verified_at.
Mobile App / Job Seeker: attach a catalog skill to profile. Skill responses loaded through the profile include pivot source_type, source_cv_file_id, and user_verified_at.
Mobile App / Job Seeker: remove a profile skill.
Lists active and archived CV versions. Responses must not expose disk or stored_path.
Idempotently sets an owned, active, available CV as primary.
Route the mobile UI using review_mode, review_status, and next_action. parsed_json is read-only.
Only for initial_import/draft. Replaces reviewed_json completely without changing parsed_json.
Mobile App / Job Seeker: list uploaded CV files.
Mobile App / Job Seeker: upload PDF/DOCX CV and queue parsing.
Mobile App / Job Seeker: view one CV upload record.
Mobile App / Job Seeker: view parsed CV output.
Mobile App / Job Seeker: for initial_import, atomically applies reviewed_json once; for profile_sync, delegates to suggestion generation for backward compatibility.
Mobile App / Job Seeker: list pending/applied/rejected profile suggestions for a CV.
Mobile App / Job Seeker: compare parsed CV with profile and generate reviewable suggestions.
Mobile App / Job Seeker: save an accept decision and optional entity-specific edited_value. This does not update the profile; final apply is required.
Mobile App / Job Seeker: save a reject decision without updating the profile. The decision can be changed until final apply.
Mobile App / Job Seeker: apply accepted suggestions by id. Accepted CV data is tracked as cv_confirmed or cv_merged, and manual data has priority during merges.
Save Changes: atomically applies all accepted suggestions for one CV. Returns counts, profile, and already_applied for safe retries.
Omits a CV id and resolves the current primary CV atomically.
Expected 422 PRIMARY_CV_REQUIRED when no explicit or primary CV exists.
Creates an application when the job is open, its company is approved, and now is at or before the deadline.
Use an open job whose deadline has passed. No application, history, or notification is created.

response.name: 409 deadline passed

request.description: Mobile App / Job Seeker: submit application for an open job owned by an approved company. Requires selected_cv_file_id owned by the authenticated job seeker and consent_to_share_profile=true. A non-approved company returns 403 COMPANY_RECRUITMENT_UNAVAILABLE without creating application history or notifications.

response.name: 403 company recruitment unavailable

request.description: Mobile App / Job Seeker: submit application using the /applications/{jobPosting} alias. Requires selected_cv_file_id owned by the authenticated job seeker and consent_to_share_profile=true.

Mobile App / Job Seeker: list own applications with a candidate-safe status timeline. Historical applications remain readable when the company is pending, rejected, or suspended. Internal hiring notes and actor identities are intentionally excluded.

exec: if (pm.response.code === 200) { const item = pm.response.json().data.data[0] || {}; const history = (item.status_history || [])[0] || {}; pm.test('candidate application timeline excludes internal fields', () => { pm.expect(history).not.to.have.property('note'); pm.expect(history).not.to.have.property('changed_by_user_id'); pm.expect(history).not.to.have.property('changed_by'); pm.expect(item).not.to.have.property('internal_notes'); pm.expect(item).not.to.have.property('internal_notes_count'); pm.expect(item).not.to.have.property('latest_internal_note_at'); }); }

request.description: Mobile App / Job Seeker: view own candidate-safe application details. Internal hiring notes, employee identities, and interview evaluations are intentionally excluded.

exec: if (pm.response.code === 200) { const data = pm.response.json().data; pm.test('application details exclude private hiring data', () => { pm.expect(data).not.to.have.property('job_seeker_profile'); pm.expect(data).not.to.have.property('evaluation'); pm.expect(data).not.to.have.property('internal_notes'); pm.expect(data).not.to.have.property('internal_notes_count'); pm.expect(data).not.to.have.property('latest_internal_note_at'); (data.status_history || []).forEach(item => { pm.expect(item).not.to.have.property('note'); pm.expect(item).not.to.have.property('changed_by'); }); }); }

request.description: Mobile App / Job Seeker: withdraw own active application.
Returns 409 APPLICATION_INFORMATION_REQUEST_EXPIRED without changing application state.
Mobile App / Job Seeker: list invitations with UTC deadline, expiry, and action flags. Internal extension reasons and actors are omitted.
Candidates must use My Test Invitations and the attempt-scoped questions endpoint; the management catalog is forbidden even after assignment/start.

exec: pm.test('catalog is forbidden to candidates', () => { pm.response.to.have.status(403); pm.expect(pm.response.json().code).to.eql('TEST_CATALOG_FORBIDDEN'); });

response.name: Candidate catalog forbidden

request.description: Mobile App / Job Seeker: start before or exactly at the deadline. Company recruitment suspension returns 403 COMPANY_RECRUITMENT_UNAVAILABLE; an expired assignment returns 409.

exec: if (pm.response.code === 201) { const data = pm.response.json().data; pm.expect(data.effective_deadline_at).to.be.a('string'); pm.expect(data.remaining_seconds).to.be.at.least(0); pm.expect(data.is_time_expired).to.eql(false); pm.expect(data.can_edit_answers).to.eql(true); pm.expect(data.can_submit).to.eql(true); pm.environment.set('test_attempt_id', data.id); pm.environment.set('test_attempt_effective_deadline', data.effective_deadline_at); }

response.name: 409 start expired
403 company recruitment unavailable

request.description: The only candidate content endpoint. Requires ownership and a started attempt; remains safe to read after submission. It never returns points, correct-answer flags, passing score, reviewer notes, or catalog internals.

response.name: Attempt not started

request.description: Lists the authenticated candidate's normalized saved answers.
Draft save is allowed through exact equality with effective_deadline_at.
Run after test_attempt_effective_deadline. Returns 409 TEST_ATTEMPT_TIME_EXPIRED without changing the saved answer.
Private multipart file answer, maximum 10 MB.
Atomic upsert; file questions are excluded.
Authorized private download; no storage path is exposed.

Mobile App / Job Seeker: submit before or exactly at the deadline. Company recruitment suspension returns 403 COMPANY_RECRUITMENT_UNAVAILABLE; expiry returns 409. Neither failure grades the attempt or changes workflow.

response.name: 409 submit expired

request.description: Candidate-safe summary only; reviewer notes, graders, correct options, and per-question correctness are omitted.
Candidate-safe attempt series with attempt numbers, deadlines, preserved summary results, and attempts remaining.
The latest item from My Assigned Tests is operationally current; internal retake reason and grant actor are omitted.
Starts only the latest pending retake assignment.
Previous submitted result remains immutable and candidate-safe.
Submits the new attempt independently and returns the application to test_completed.
Expected 409: the previous assignment was superseded by a newer retake.
Mobile App / Job Seeker: list candidate-safe interview schedules. Internal notes, actor IDs, and evaluation details are intentionally excluded.

exec: if (pm.response.code === 200) { const item = pm.response.json().data.data[0] || {}; pm.test('candidate interview list excludes private fields', () => { ['note','completion_note','scheduled_by_user_id','completed_by_user_id','evaluation'].forEach(key => pm.expect(item).not.to.have.property(key)); }); }

request.description: Mobile App / Job Seeker: view an authorized candidate-safe interview schedule. Evaluations, recommendations, reviewer comments, internal notes, and internal actor IDs are intentionally excluded.

exec: if (pm.response.code === 200) { const data = pm.response.json().data; pm.test('interview details exclude private fields', () => { ['note','internal_note','completion_note','cancellation_reason','attendance_note','scheduled_by_user_id','confirmed_by_user_id','completed_by_user_id','cancelled_by_user_id','attendance_recorded_by_user_id','evaluation','recommendation','overall_comment','status_history','schedule_history'].forEach(key => pm.expect(data).not.to.have.property(key)); }); }

request.description: Candidate owner confirms a scheduled or rescheduled interview.
Candidate-safe view of the new schedule; confirmation returns to pending.
Candidate-safe cancellation view exposes only cancellation_message, never the internal reason or actor.
Used by Job Seeker mobile app notification center. Uses {{job_seeker_token}}. Lists paginated notifications for the authenticated job seeker.
Used by Job Seeker mobile app notification center. Uses {{job_seeker_token}}. Lists unread notifications only.
Used by Job Seeker mobile app notification center. Uses {{job_seeker_token}}. Returns the unread notification count.
Used by Job Seeker mobile app notification center. Uses {{job_seeker_token}}. Marks one owned notification as read.
Used by Job Seeker mobile app notification center. Uses {{job_seeker_token}}. Marks all current job seeker notifications as read.
Used by Job Seeker mobile app notification center. Uses {{job_seeker_token}}. Deletes one owned notification.
